mapper.sql: id, reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason, description, status, handler_id, handle_note, handled_time, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE reporter_id = #{reporterId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report (reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason, description, status) VALUES (#{reporterId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reason}, #{description}, 'PENDING')
